message:
test(bd-vooa): add 65 unit tests for providers/filesystem.rs

Cover FilesystemProviderError all variants display/debug/clone/
std Error/From McpError, FilesystemProvider constructor defaults/
all builder methods/debug/clone, URI methods (file_uri/uri_template/
path_from_uri with and without prefix), matches_patterns logic
(no includes/no excludes, excludes only, includes only, exclude
takes priority), validate_path not-found, read_file not-found,
detect_mime_type extended coverage (text formats, programming
languages, images, binary, no extension), is_binary_mime_type
(audio/video/archives/text types), base64_encode extended,
glob_match edge cases (exact/empty/star-empty/double-star-alone/
mixed), FilesystemResourceHandler (debug/definition without prefix/
template without prefix/cached resources/missing path param/
binary blob), list_files with hidden default exclusion,
DEFAULT_MAX_SIZE constant, FileEntry debug, builder chaining.

Server test count: 935 → 1000.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
